name: automation-builder
description: Browser-automation planner and worker: a think-process skill that turns an automation goal into a tool choice (Playwright/Puppeteer vs anti-detect AdsPower/Kameleo/Camoufox) and a sequenced plan, plus a browser-automation-engineer agent that scaffolds and runs the automation. Includes /automation-builder:build and an automation-keyword reminder hook. Pairs with the playwright, puppeteer, adspower, kameleo, and camoufox plugins; defers doc verification to api-docs-first.
